app-nav: height: 48px; padding: 0 14px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding-top: 44px; padding-bottom: 6px;
app-logo: font-family: var(--logo-font); font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.5px; color: var(--text);
icon: width: 24px; height: 24px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: var(--text);
stories: display: flex; gap: 12px; padding: 10px 14px; overflow-x: auto; border-bottom: 0.5px solid var(--separator);
story: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 4px; flex-shrink: 0;
story-ring: width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; padding: 2px; background: var(--gradient-brand);
story-ring-inner: width: 100%; height: 100%; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--bg); padding: 2px;
story-label: font-size: 11px; color: var(--text); max-width: 56px; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap;
post-header: height: 48px; display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 0 14px; gap: 10px;
action-bar: height: 44px; display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 0 14px; gap: 16px;
caption: padding: 0 14px; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.35; margin-bottom: 4px;
caption-meta: padding: 0 14px; font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-secondary); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px; margin-top: 4px;
tab-bar: margin-top: auto; height: 49px; border-top: 0.5px solid var(--separator); background: rgba(0,0,0,0.92); backdrop-filter: saturate(180%) blur(20px); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-around; padding: 0 8px;
tab-avatar: width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 50%; border: 1.5px solid var(--text); background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFD6C9, #FFE29A);
